text: Best insurance experience ever. Signed up in 5 minutes. Claims process was instant — got paid in minutes. Ease of use is unmatched. Love the AI approach.
Super easy to use. Pricing transparency is excellent. Claims were fast. Coverage options are limited compared to traditional insurers. Great for renters.
Best value for auto insurance. Coverage options are comprehensive. Claims process was smooth. Customer support was helpful. Been with them 5 years.
Good coverage at fair price. App is functional. Claims took 2 weeks. Pricing transparency is decent. Solid choice.
Comprehensive coverage options. Agent was helpful. Claims process was okay. Ease of use — more traditional. Good for bundled policies.
Coverage is extensive. App is clunky. Claims took 3 weeks. Customer support was slow. Traditional but reliable.
Claims process is revolutionary. Filed claim, got paid in 10 minutes. Ease of use is 10/10. Pricing is transparent. Best for renters insurance.
Value for money is excellent. Coverage options cover everything I need. Claims were straightforward. Recommend for auto.
Agent network is a plus. Coverage options are comprehensive. Claims process is traditional. Good for home + auto bundles.
Ease of use is best in class. Pricing transparency is great. Coverage options are limited. Claims were fast. Best for simple policies.
Competitive pricing. Good coverage. Customer support was adequate. Claims process was fine. Good value.
Coverage options are extensive. Ease of use is lacking. Claims took a month. Pricing transparency could improve. Traditional insurer.
Digital-first experience. Claims in minutes. Pricing is clear. Coverage is basic but sufficient for renters. Love it.
Best auto insurance value. Coverage options are comprehensive. Claims were handled well. Customer support was responsive.
Agent support is valuable. Coverage options are top tier. Claims process is slower. Good for complex needs.
Claims process is instant. Ease of use is unmatched. Pricing transparency. Giveback program is nice. Best renters insurance.
Value for money is strong. Coverage options are good. Claims were processed in 2 weeks. Solid insurer.
Comprehensive coverage. Agent network helps. Ease of use is average. Claims process is traditional. Good for bundles.
Revolutionary claims. Signed up in minutes. Paid in minutes when I had a claim. Pricing is transparent. Best digital insurer.
Best auto insurance. Great value. Good coverage. Claims were smooth. Recommend.
